title: Tac UI
description: A cross-platform design system built with shared tokens, React components, and comprehensive theming. Ship consistent, accessible UIs faster.

designTokens.title: Design Tokens
designTokens.description: Shared color, spacing, typography, and motion tokens across platforms.

components.title: 40+ Components
components.description: Production-ready React components with full TypeScript support.

darkMode.title: Dark Mode
darkMode.description: Built-in light and dark themes via CSS custom properties.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Focus trapping, keyboard navigation, and ARIA attributes built in.

charts.title: Charts
charts.description: Pure SVG chart components that consume your design tokens.

layoutSystem.title: Layout System
layoutSystem.description: 9 pre-composed page layout patterns for rapid scaffolding.

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.description: Install the packages and wrap your app with the provider.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: Import components and use them with full TypeScript IntelliSense.
